HomePage.subtitle3: , and I help you achieve this.

about.name: Nami Sawada
about.description:
I’m a curious, results-driven web developer who enjoys tackling difficult challenges. I specialise in improving UI/UX and optimising SEO. Nothing motivates me more than seeing CVR increase and users satisfied with the product I work on.

Currently, I’m based in Bergen, Norway, working as an SEO manager and a marketer at Alt Japansk AS while pursuing a degree in IU International University online.

Previously, I lived in Tokyo and worked as a web developer for clients, including a fast-paced international startup and large Japanese companies. There, I worked closely with designers and their clients, bridging the gap between ideas and systems.

Outside of work, you can find me hiking on the fjords, running outside at dawn, or having a cake and coffee with my friends at a cafe 🍰

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: I have a wide range of skills from working with clients in various environments, from legacy systems to modern technologies. Here are some of the tools and technologies I use.

recent_work.heading: Recent Work
recent_work.description: I have worked on developing not only SaaS systems and B2C apps but also high graphic websites. You can find my full work history and the details in my resume.
